---
title: "HackODS UNAM 2026"
page-layout: full
listing:
  - id: podio
    contents: tableros-podio.yml
    template: _podio.ejs
    sort: "order"
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
  - id: finalistas
    contents: tableros-finalistas.yml
    template: _finalistas.ejs
    sort: "order"
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
---


::: {#podio}
:::

## Finalistas

[en orden alfabético]{.section-note}

::: {#finalistas}
:::
